name: Travel Medicine & Vaccination
shortDescription: Pre-travel health consultations, vaccinations, and travel health certificates for international travelers.
fullDescription: Our Travel Medicine service prepares travelers for safe and healthy international journeys. We provide comprehensive pre-travel consultations, recommended vaccinations, malaria prophylaxis, travel health kits, and health certificates. Whether you're traveling to a tropical region, Southeast Asia, or further afield, our doctors will ensure you are properly protected before you go.
